name: Pickled Zante Grapes
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Zante grapes (also called Zante currants and Champagne grapes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the Zante grapes thoroughly.
2. Remove any damaged or blemished grapes.
3. Place the clean grapes in a jar large enough to hold them.
4. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
6. Let the mixture cool completely.
7. Pour the cooled liquid over the grapes, ensuring they are fully covered.
8. Cover the jar and refrigerate for at least one week before consuming.
9. Properly stored, this pickled grape mixture will keep for several months in the refrigerator.
Makes about 2 quarts.
Per ounce: 50 calories, 0g protein, 13g carbohydrate, 0g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 2mg sodium, 2g fiber.
